caption: A man wearing a white button-down shirt, white suspenders, a red bow tie, and a distinctive tall, silver, textured wig speaks into a professional microphone. He is wearing black over-ear headphones and glasses. He is positioned in a room with walls adorned with numerous framed photographs and posters, including a visible "LEE" logo. A microphone on a boom arm is positioned in front of him. A logo on the screen reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" alongside a graphic of a microphone. As the sequence progresses, the man gestures with his hand and shifts his facial expression while speaking, though his position and the background remain constant. The lighting is bright and consistent throughout the scene.
